methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series E → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.4x) to $318M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Climate & Energy (found 0 same-stage, 2 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 9 same-sector peers exist in Climate & Energy, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Climate & Bio-Manufacturing

data.narrative:
Svante, a Series E climate and energy technology company founded by Brett Henkel, has raised $318M to date. The comparable universe includes one public peer (LNZA) and eight private companies in the climate and energy sector, including Helion, Redwood Materials, QuantumScape, KoBold Metals, and Electric Hydrogen. However, the peer set lacks sufficient same-stage or adjacent-stage comparables to support a reliable median valuation derived from public trading multiples or recent private rounds.

Given data constraints, the stage-progression method is the primary applicable approach. Using total capital raised ($318M) as a valuation proxy and applying a 1.4x step-up multiplier typical of Series E advancement yields $445M. This reflects the expected value creation and dilution dynamics between stages. The method carries inherent limitations, as it does not capture sector-specific growth trajectories, unit economics, or path to profitability.

The analysis supports a valuation range of $378M to $512M, centered on $445M. The low bound represents a conservative 1.2x applied to raised capital; the high bound reflects a 1.6x multiplier. Key uncertainties include the absence of tightly comparable recent Series E or Series F transactions in the climate-tech space, making stage-progression a single-method valuation. Independent validation through discounted cash flow analysis or closer peer matching would strengthen conviction in this range.
